title: leontodon asperifolius
intro: Leontodon asperifolius, also known as the rough-leaved hawk's beard or sharp-leaved hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and reducing fever. The plant has been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Leontodon asperifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to reap its health benefits and medicinal properties.
